description_long: This is a long, single-story bank building with a sloped reddish-brown roof and light gray exterior walls. The structure features a prominent tower element on one end, topped with a matching roof, and several large rectangular windows along the main facade. Blue signage with white text is visible above the entrance and on the tower, indicating the bank's branding. The main entrance is located near the tower and is marked by a set of double glass doors, with what appears to be an ATM or vending machine area to the left. The building's design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on accessibility. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary commercial style commonly found in suburban or small urban neighborhoods.
description: A long, single-story bank with a reddish-brown sloped roof, light gray walls, blue signage, and a prominent tower at one end.
description_view_0: End view showing the narrow side of the building, the sloped roof, and part of the blue signage near the entrance.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain, windowless back wall and the roofline, with the tower visible at one end.
description_view_2: Opposite end view highlighting the tower structure, the sloped roof, and a glimpse of the main entrance area.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full length of the facade, multiple windows, blue signage, the main entrance, and the tower.
attribute_signage: Blue rectangular signs with white text are located above the main entrance and on the tower, featuring a bank logo and branding.
attribute_entrance_design: Main entrance features a set of double glass doors framed in metal, with blue signage above and an adjacent ATM area; the entrance is simple and functional with minimal decorative elements.
